education.program: Bachelor of Science in General Science (Physics, Chemistry)
details: General Science degree with a concentration in physics and chemistry.
Graduated with a 3.0 GPA.
Ongoing, expected completion in April 2026.
Certificate program focused on spatial data analysis, GIS, and geospatial technologies.
Current GPA: 3.9.
Classified satellite and drone imagery using a pixel-based supervised learning model (Random Trees) to map land cover at Elk Creek, an active stream restoration site in Alberta.
Built 2023-2025 change detection analysis to quantify vegetation recovery, including shrub expansion and restoration fence impact, with accuracy assessed through confusion matrices.
Produced figures and a stacked 3D land classification map for two poster presentations targeting general and technical stakeholder audiences.
Processed and tabulated lab results into clean templates to support contamination analysis.
Compared new results with historical datasets and guidelines to identify exceedances.
Wrote clear stakeholder-ready summaries with recommended next steps.
Managed listings, scheduling, and client communications; supported property showings.
Worked in a high-throughput operation; resolved labeling/packaging exceptions to keep flow accurate.

details: Quantitative background with strong problem-solving and technical communication.
